title: Bhavnagar Municipal Corporation – Fireman, Clerk and More – 120 Posts
shortInfo: Bhavnagar Municipal Corporation Recruitment 2026: 120 new Fireman, Clerk and More vacancies. Apply online from 10 May to 31 May 2026 at ojas.gujarat.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: BMC Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 120 Fireman, Clerk and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Bhavnagar Municipal Corporation Recruitment 2026: 120 new Fireman, Clerk and More vacancies. Apply online from 10 May to 31 May 2026 at ojas.gujarat.gov.in.

application_fee.general_fee: Post Office only - last date 02/06/2026 up to 15:00 hrs

age_limit.age_details: Document Verification - candidates clearing written exam / physical test will be called for original document verification

qualification.education_qualification: Any Graduate, B.Tech/B.E, LLB, Diploma, 12TH, MS/MD

selection_process: Merit-based Shortlisting + Written Examination (MCQ) + Physical Test (for Fire posts)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the OJAS Gujarat portal at ojas.gujarat.gov.in. No offline, postal, or in-person applications will be accepted under any circumstances. The portal will be active from 10/05/2026 (14:00 hrs) to 31/05/2026 (23:59 hrs). Candidates are strongly advised to read the detailed notification carefully before applying. Candidates must ensure eligibility before submitting the online application - the qualification, pay scale, and all other information is available on the OJAS website and the BMC website www.bmcgujarat.com.
